title: 100 Days of Love
subTitle: A columnist reunites with his childhood rival and unexpectedly falls in love. However, just as he gathers the courage to confess, he discovers that she is engaged to another.

title: Mariville
subTitle: A rich businessman, Uday, falls deeply in love with a simple woman, Sandhya. Despite learning about her terminal illness, he continues to pursue her and motivates her to live life to the fullest.

title: Pedithondan
subTitle: Rajeev is a young villager, whose life changes when he is asked to perform Theyyam, a ritual dance. He, however, is afraid of the ritual and runs away from the village in order to escape it.

title: Filler
subTitle: A comprehensive compilation of promotional videos and trailers of Bollywood movies featuring popular actors and actresses.

title: Filler
subTitle: A comprehensive compilation of promotional videos and trailers of Bollywood movies featuring popular actors and actresses.

title: Cheriya Lokavum Valiya Manushyarum
subTitle: When four theives break into a house, they are confronted by the owner. Later, the owner tries to change their lives by suggesting them to rob from the rich and give it to the poor.

title: Pranayavarnangal
subTitle: Maya, a close friend of Arathi, plays a prank on her by sending her fake love letters in the name of Vinayachandran. Arathi falls for it but Vinayachandran has feelings for Maya and proposes marriage.

title: Vellam
subTitle: Murali, a man struggling with alcoholism, is humiliated and considered a burden. After recovering, he returns home to discover that his family has abandoned him.

title: Jalolsavam
subTitle: With his father's death, Chandran takes responsibility for his family along with the debts that his father has left behind. He also has to save his love from getting married to someone else.

title: Munthirivallikal Thalirkkumbol
subTitle: Ulahannan, a middle-aged government official, decides to break away from his monotonous life by having an affair with an another woman. However, soon he realises his mistake and tries to make amends.

title: Kauravar
subTitle: Antony, a convict, wants revenge against Haridas, an inspector, for killing his family and arresting him. However, his motive changes when he discovers that his daughter is still alive.

title: Kauravar
subTitle: Antony, a convict, wants revenge against Haridas, an inspector, for killing his family and arresting him. However, his motive changes when he discovers that his daughter is still alive.

title: Puthiya Velicham
subTitle: A criminal plans his biggest heist with his lover. However, things change when he stumbles upon a beautiful widow while breaking into a house.

title: Oru Sumangaliyude Katha
subTitle: When Rajendran returns from his office, he finds a dead body in his house. Subsequently, terrified of the consequences, he dumps the body into a ravine, which ends up inviting more trouble.

title: Teleshopping
subTitle: The host showcases the features of a variety of products manufactured by renowned brands that can be purchased from the comfort of one's home.

title: Filler
subTitle: A comprehensive compilation of promotional videos and trailers of Bollywood movies featuring popular actors and actresses.

title: Munnariyippu
subTitle: Raghavan, an ex-convict seeking redemption, crosses paths with Anjali, a journalist. As she delves into his past for an autobiography, he struggles with his dark history and the weight of expectations.

title: Ajith
subTitle: Ajith, an unemployed man, lives a carefree life in Bangalore but his friends help him look for a job. Soon, he meets a woman called Charulatha and falls in love with her.

title: Soothradharan
subTitle: Ramesan ends up in a brothel while searching for his friend. Later, he strives to save a young girl from human trafficking.

title: In Harihar Nagar
subTitle: Four young men are enamoured by Maya, their next-door neighbour. However, she is in town to investigate the mysterious circumstances surrounding the death of her brother.

title: Ghajini
subTitle: Chitra decides to study the case of Surya, a man suffering from short term memory loss, for her medical school project. Meanwhile, Surya sets out on a quest to take revenge on his lover's killers.

title: Sapthamashree Thaskaraha
subTitle: Seven men, after getting acquainted in prison and finding out that all of their lives have been affected by the same con man, decide to raid the fraudster's life savings.

title: Sapthamashree Thaskaraha
subTitle: Seven men, after getting acquainted in prison and finding out that all of their lives have been affected by the same con man, decide to raid the fraudster's life savings.

title: Venalil Oru Mazha
subTitle: Vasu, a trolley driver, struggles to provide for his poor family. His life takes a turn when he meets with an accident and loses his left hand.

title: Amme Bhagavathi
subTitle: Parvathy, a devotee of Goddess Durga, struggles to run her family. Goddess Durga comes in the form of Parvathy's daughter in order to teach a lesson to all those who trouble Parvathy.

title: Teleshopping
subTitle: The host showcases the features of a variety of products manufactured by renowned brands that can be purchased from the comfort of one's home.

title: Filler
subTitle: A comprehensive compilation of promotional videos and trailers of Bollywood movies featuring popular actors and actresses.

title: Magic Lamp
subTitle: Anupama, a young woman, lies about her love life, which leads to misunderstandings as she tries to run away from her conservative family.

title: Runner
subTitle: Ajay, a fearless Kabaddi player, rescues Swapna from the ruthless Obul Reddy, who is obsessed with marrying her. Subsequently, Ajay stands his ground when he pursues them.

title: Karinkunnam 6's
subTitle: When an unexpected tragedy makes Aby immobile, his volleyball team is acquired by another businessman. However, his wife takes up the challenge of forming a new team in order to fulfil Aby's wish.

title: The King
subTitle: After learning that an elected representative in the parliament is corrupted and involved in many crimes, Alex, an IAS officer, decides to expose his misdeeds in front of the public.

title: Viswasam
subTitle: Thooku Durai, a strong and respected village leader, faces personal struggles as he tries to reunite with his estranged wife Niranjana and daughter, all while confronting challenges from his past.

title: Nirnnayakam
subTitle: Ajay, a student at the National Defense Academy, aids his advocate father in a case and exposes governmental negligence.
